Name: Main MCU
Description: SiP with 8MB flash + 2MB PSRAM, WiFi + BLE + Bluetooth Classic.

Name: Power Management IC
Description: Manages all voltage rails, LiPo charging, and USB-C power input.

Name: Real-time Clock
Description: Low power RTC with alarm function and backup battery input.

Name: LiPo Battery
Description: Single-cell 3.7V LiPo rechargeable battery.

Name: USB-C Connector
Description: For charging and programming ESP32.

Name: Heart Rate & SpO2 Sensor
Description: Integrated pulse oximetry and heart-rate sensor module.

Name: 6-axis IMU
Description: Accelerometer and gyroscope for motion tracking.

Name: Haptic Driver
Description: Haptic feedback driver for LRA motors.

Name: LRA Vibration Motor
Description: Linear Resonant Actuator for haptic feedback.

Name: 1.54 inch IPS LCD
Description: 1.54" IPS LCD with 240x240 resolution, ST7789V3 driver.

Name: Capacitive Touch Controller
Description: Capacitive touch overlay controller for the display.

Name: PDM Microphone
Description: PDM digital microphone for audio input.

Name: I2S Speaker Amplifier
Description: Class D I2S speaker amplifier.

Name: Small Speaker
Description: Small 8-10mm speaker for audio output.

Name: LTE-M Cellular Module
Description: LTE-M cellular module with GNSS capability.

Name: LTE Module Main LDO
Description: High-efficiency 3.3V LDO regulator, 2A peak current capable for SIM7080G.

Name: eSIM MFF2 Package
Description: MFF2 soldered eSIM for cellular connectivity.

Name: GPS/GNSS Module
Description: u-blox M10 standard precision GNSS module.

Name: LTE-M FPC Antenna Connector
Description: Connector for external LTE-M FPC antenna.

Name: GPS FPC Antenna Connector
Description: Connector for external GPS L1 FPC antenna (user preference).

Name: POWER Button
Description: Momentary switch for power on/off control.

Name: BOOT Button
Description: Momentary switch to enter ESP32 download mode.

Name: RTC Backup Battery
Description: Small coin cell battery for PCF8563 RTC backup power.

Name: LTE Bulk Capacitor
Description: Bulk capacitor for LTE module power stability (1000uF).

Name: I2C0 Pull-ups
Description: 4.7kΩ pull-up resistors for shared I2C Bus 0.

Name: I2C1 Pull-ups
Description: 4.7kΩ pull-up resistors for separate I2C Bus 1.

Name: Smartwatch Main Enclosure
Description: Main body of the smartwatch housing PCB, display, and battery. Includes internal mounts, cutouts for USB-C, mic, speaker, buttons, and a window for HR/SpO2 sensor.

Name: Smartwatch Back Cover
Description: Bottom cover for the smartwatch, seals the enclosure. Includes opening for heart rate sensor lens.

Name: Display Retaining Frame
Description: Frame to hold the 1.54 inch IPS LCD and capacitive touch panel securely in the main enclosure.

Name: Power Button Actuator
Description: Custom button cap for the physical power button.

Name: Boot Button Actuator
Description: Custom button cap for the physical boot (download mode) button.

Name: HR Sensor Optical Lens
Description: Transparent insert for the MAX30102 LED/sensor window, allowing skin contact while protecting the sensor.

Name: PCB Mounting Standoffs
Description: Small brass standoffs for mounting the PCB within the enclosure.

Name: PCB Mounting Screws
Description: Small screws to secure the PCB to the standoffs.

Name: Enclosure Closure Screws
Description: Screws to secure the back cover to the main enclosure.

Name: Smartwatch Strap
Description: Standard smartwatch band to wear the device. Will house external FPC antennas.

Name: LTE-M FPC Antenna
Description: Flexible PCB antenna for LTE-M, to be integrated into the watch band.

Name: GPS FPC Antenna
Description: Flexible PCB antenna for GPS L1, to be integrated into the watch band (user preference).

Name: USB-C Port Gasket
Description: Small silicone gasket to provide water resistance around the USB-C port.

Name: Button Gaskets
Description: Small silicone gaskets for water resistance around the power and boot buttons.

Name: Display Mounting Adhesive
Description: Double-sided adhesive tape for securing the display assembly to the enclosure.
